raw_consumer_statement: I visited my sister on the XXXX day in XXXX and stayed at a local hotel overnight. I booked the hotel through an online third party vender. However, after I got back home, I found that the hotel double-charged my credit card for the staying. I already paid the third party vender, Agoda.com, {$170.00} for the night. The hotel charged me again of the {$170.00}. I have tried to dispute the charge with the credit card company, which is Citi Bank. But Citi bank said that the hotel had provided the service to me, so the charge was correct. I told them that I already paid the hotel through the XXXX. They just ignored me. The Citi Bank refused to resolve the problem and keeps charging interests and fees to my account.
